content: In this lecture, the class plays the game Prisoner’s Dilemma, and then Ian Ball discusses the concept of finitely repeated games.
title: Lecture 12: Finitely Repeated Games

video_metadata.video_tags: 14-12-economic-applications-of-game-theory-fall-2025, backward induction, cooperation, finitely repeated games, prisoner's dilemma
